summary: Scaffold executor domain microservice from template with Express, OpenTelemetry bootstrap, and RFC 9457 problem+json defaults.

integration_points.notes: Template exposes health check handler that will be reused verbatim in executor scaffold.
Entry point wires OpenTelemetry bootstrap prior to HTTP server creation.
Template README documents default service metadata that must be renamed for executor.
Package metadata requires renaming to @executor/executor-service for new scaffold.
Default port needs to change to 3001 per executor requirements.

risks: Ensure sed-based replacements run correctly on GNU sed (container uses GNU).
Validate npm run validate:all script completes without modifying lockfile.
